prompts.fixed_prefix: 3D rendered cute character illustration, consistent character design, {MAIN_COLOR} as primary accent color, {SUB_COLOR} as secondary color,
prompts.fixed_suffix: , soft studio lighting, minimal clean background, high quality, detailed, professional product image style
prompts.negative: deformed, distorted, disfigured, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, wrong anatomy, extra limb, missing limb, floating limbs, disconnected limbs, mutation, ugly, disgusting, blurry, out of focus
